testcase.name: test_progress_submission_success
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_classroom_batch3.py:43: in setup_session assert teacher_res.status_code == 200, f"Teacher registration failed: {teacher_res.text}" E AssertionError: Teacher registration failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","full_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"TEST_teacher_prog_7e9b511a@test.com","password":"Test123!","name":"Progress Teacher 7e9b511a","role":"teacher"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
